notes:
Ember 1.10.4 — Download protection that actually does something

• When you download an executable, Ember now jumps to the FRONT of your screen with a review popup instead of a toast you'll miss.
• Scan it: one click runs a full scan — the local engines PLUS an AI second opinion from whatever model you have an API key for (Gemini or Claude). If it's malicious, Ember auto-quarantines it so it can't run.
• Block it: Quarantine moves the file out of Downloads so a double-click can't open it; Delete removes it outright.
• The AI second opinion is now available everywhere (real-time downloads and the block-before-open guard), not only after you'd opened the Antivirus window once.

Builds on 1.10.3.
